name: sensitive-data-api-keys
description: Avoidance gate — well-known API key prefixes (OpenAI sk-, AWS AKIA, GitHub ghp_, GitLab glpat-). Case-sensitive on purpose: real keys use these exact prefixes. Generic credential assignments (api_key=...) live in sensitive-data-passwords. Canonical from the TypeScript core (parity audit imports into Python). Covered by parity tests.
